untranslatable_reason: This signal is a meta-rule about system retest timing (5%-10% new data relative to original test interval), not a tradeable price/indicator condition. It requires tracking historical test interval length and calculating cumulative new data percentage, which is not expressible using the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Bar Properties, Returns). This is a portfolio/regime management rule, not an entry/exit signal.
translation_notes: Signal ID KAUFMAN_DRY_21 describes a structural change detection rule requiring backtester to retest after 5-10% new data accumulates. This is administrative/diagnostic guidance rather than a tradeable signal with price-based conditions. Cannot be translated into indicator-based entry/exit conditions.
